help.whatBody: Here you keep the items you find during the story. You can give them to {name} to take care of their needs, or combine them following recipes to craft stronger ones.
help.barsBody: Fullness, Rest, Calm and Bond: the fuller they are, the happier {name} is. Items with green numbers improve the state; yellow ones drain it.
help.combineBody: In the Recipes tab, if you have all the ingredients of a recipe it turns green and you can press "Combine". Recipes are discovered automatically when you stash the ingredients in your backpack.
help.needsBody: Every 12h without playing, Fullness, Rest and Bond drop a little. Come back and give them what they need to stay happy!
help.visitsBody: From another player's profile you can send your pet to play with theirs (4h cooldown) or gift them an item from your backpack.

stats.bondTip: How much the pet loves you

auth.title: DEDUCTION DUEL
auth.tagline: The PvP deduction game where logic beats luck. Hide, investigate and deduce! 🧠
auth.referralBonus: +5 welcome tokens when you sign up
auth.how1: Hide an object in a piece of furniture in a room
auth.how2: Observe positions to get hints (cold/warm/very hot)
auth.how3: When you’re sure, confirm to find the object and win!
auth.feat1Desc: No luck. Observe, deduce and find!
auth.feat2Desc: Hide your object and search for your rival’s
auth.feat4Desc: Climb from Bronze to Diamond with every win
auth.passwordHint: Minimum 6 characters. Pick a strong password.
auth.hasAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.tryDemo: 🎮 Try the game without signing up →
auth.demoCtaSubtitle: Guided tutorial · No signup · No card
auth.accountCreated: Account created! Check your email to confirm.
auth.footerTag: 🧠 It’s not about luck. It’s about logic.
auth.resetSent: Email sent! Check your inbox (and spam folder).
auth.resetDesc: Enter your email and we’ll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.passwordMin: The password must be at least 6 characters.

help.title: 📖 How to play Story Mode
help.basics1Body: Each scene gives you a situation and you choose what your pet does. Every decision can grant XP, items, recipes or shift its needs.
help.basics2Body: By collecting XP your pet levels up (1→10). Some levels unlock a skill (👃 Smell, 💪 Strength, ✨ Empathy, 🔥 Courage, 👑 Legend) that opens new options in the story.
help.basics3Body: Each replay reveals new branches. Look at the 'Visit #N' subtitle: different options appear depending on visits.
help.needsHunger: 😋 Hunger — rises over time. Feeding lowers it.
help.needsSleep: 😴 Sleep — rises over time. A blanket or water lowers it.
help.needsFear: 😨 Fear — rises in dangerous scenes. Toys or potions calm it.
help.needsBond: ❤️ Bond — grows by playing and gifting. Unlocks worlds.
help.needsDecayBody: When you don't play, hunger and sleep rise. If they drop too low, some endings will be worse. Come back daily and open the 🎒 backpack to give what's needed.
help.needsSickBody: Sometimes your pet gets sick (🤒 icon on profile). Friends can gift consumables to heal it.
help.recipesDiscoverBody: When you have all ingredients of a recipe in the backpack, it's discovered automatically. You'll see a 💡 notice and the recipe in the Recipes tab.
help.recipesBuildBody: In the backpack, Recipes tab, tap ✨ Combine. Ingredients are consumed and you get the new item (usually more powerful).
help.recipesTipBody: 💡 Undiscovered recipes show as '???' — explore the story and gather items to reveal them.
help.worldsTipBody: Worlds with very high requirements show as '???' until you're close.
help.socialVisitBody: On another player's profile tap 'Send pet to play'. Pets interact for 30 min and you see 🤝 friendship, 😐 neutral or 💢 fight.
help.socialGiftBody: Gift any backpack item to another player from their profile. Adds relationship points.
help.socialFriendsBody: Good encounters make you friends; bad ones make you enemies. Visible on the public profile.
help.socialCooldownBody: ⏰ 4h cooldown between visits to the same pet. Check '🐾 Recent activity' on your profile.

helpPvp.title: 📖 How to play

firstTime.title: 👋 First time?
firstTime.body: Read these 7 steps and you'll be playing your first game in 3 minutes!

helpPvp.tipText: 💡 Tip: in your game, tap 🤫 My hiding spot if you forget where you hid your object.

s1.title: 🎯 What's the game?
s1.text: You and the rival each hide ONE object in a scenario (a house with rooms). Whoever finds the other's object first wins!

s2.title: 🫣 Hide your object
s2.text: Pick: ROOM → OBJECT (a key, a ring...) → FURNITURE to hide it on → POSITION (on top, under, inside). You can leave a funny message the rival will see when they find it.

s3.title: 🚶 Move around the house
s3.text: Each room has doors to 1-2 adjacent rooms. Moving costs few tokens. You need to reach the room where you think the rival hid their object.

s4.title: 👀 Look at the furniture
s4.text:
In a room, observe the furniture (0.3🪙 per look). You get 5-level hints:
❄️ Frozen → Very far
🥶 Cold → Neighboring room
🌬️ Cool → Right room, unrelated furniture
🌡️ Warm → Right room, similar furniture
🔥 Hot → Correct furniture! Try another position

⚠️ 20% of hints can mislead you (±1 level). The victory is never fake.

s5.title: 🏆 Winning
s5.text: If you guess the exact FURNITURE + POSITION, you find the object and win! You take a reward (a piece of furniture for your collection).

s6.title: 🪙 Tokens
s6.text: You have 4 tokens per day (they reset on their own). Each action costs a bit. If you run out, wait until tomorrow or invite friends for bonus tokens.

s7.title: ⚡ Tricks and social items
s7.text: You can mess with the rival! Bananas 🍌 (block a position), smoke bombs 💣 (move your object!), traps 🪤, shields 🛡️... See the 'Full rules' tab for all of them.

r1.title: 🎯 Goal
r1.text: Hide an object and look for the rival's. First to find it wins!

r2.title: 🫣 Hiding phase
r2.text: Choose scenario → object → furniture → position (on/under/inside). You can write an optional message shown when the rival finds your object. Both hide at the same time.

r3.title: 🪙 Tokens
r3.text: You have 4 tokens per day, they reset automatically. You can spend bonus tokens earned from rewards. Manage them well!

r4.title: 🚶 Move · {cost}🪙
r4.text: Change room. Each room has doors connecting to others.

r5.title: 👀 Look · {cost}🪙
r5.text:
Look at one furniture position (⬆️ on, ⬇️ under, 📦 inside, 🔙 behind). If you guess furniture + position, you find the object and win! Otherwise, you get a 5-level hint:
❄️ Frozen → Very far room.
🥶 Cold → Room near the correct one.
🌬️ Cool → Right room, but unrelated furniture.
🌡️ Warm → Right room, similar furniture category.
🔥 Hot → Correct furniture! Try another position.

⚠️ Heads up: there's a 20% chance the hint misleads you with an adjacent level. Victory is never fake.

ℹ️ Some furniture doesn't allow all positions (a rug has no 'inside', a tree has no 'behind'…). Disabled buttons tell you.

r6.title: 💡 Hints about the rival's object
r6.text: On turn 2 you get the 1st hint about the object you're looking for. On turn 5, the 2nd. They help you deduce WHAT you're looking for.

r7.title: ⚡ Social items
r7.text:
Once a day you can use an item (except barricade and trap which can be used 2x/day):
🍌 Banana — Blocks 1 rival position.
💣 Smoke bomb — Moves YOUR object to another room (1 use/game).
🛡️ Shield — Protects from the next attack.
🔄 Swap — Swaps your location with the rival's.
🕵️ Spy — Reveals where the rival is.
🚧 Barricade (2/day) — Blocks a path. Rival can force it paying +1🪙 (single-use toll: then it falls).
🪤 Trap (2/day) — Place a trap on furniture. If rival looks, they lose 1🪙 (min 0).
🔧 Steal screwdriver — Steals 1 screwdriver from the rival.
💡 Hint — Send a message or bluff.

r8.title: 🎁 Bonus and tools
r8.text:
When you look, there's a 20% chance to find extra tokens or tools:
🧹 Rag (×5) — clean dirty furniture.
🔨 Hammer (×5) — break fragile furniture.
🔧 Screwdriver (×5 extra, everyone starts with 1).
🔦 Flashlight (×3) — dark zones.
⚠️ SHARED POOL: Whoever finds it keeps it! The rival gets none!

r9.title: 💡 Light and flashlight
r9.text:
🏠 Indoors: You can turn off the light (0.2🪙) so nobody sees the furniture.
🌿 Outdoors: Use 🔦 Flashlight (0.2🪙) to reveal hidden furniture.

r10.title: ⚡ Interactive furniture
r10.text:
🧹 Clean (dirty) — 0.3🪙, needs Rag. Unlocks the "inside" position.
💥 Break (fragile) — 0.4🪙, needs Hammer, notifies the rival! Blocks "on" + "inside".
🔧 Repair (broken) — 0.3🪙, needs Screwdriver. Restores positions.
⚠️ Almost all furniture can be broken if you have a hammer!

r11.title: 📈 Elo and Leagues
r11.text:
Win: +25 Elo · Lose: -20 Elo.
🥉 Bronze → 🥈 Silver → 🥇 Gold → 💎 Platinum → 👑 Diamond.

r12.title: 🐾 Story Mode
r12.text:
Play solo against the CPU to learn the game. Adopt a virtual pet that evolves with XP!
🥚 Baby → 🌱 Young → ⭐ Adult → 🔥 Veteran → 👑 Legendary
If XP reaches 5000, the pet dies (🪦) and must restart.

r13.title: 🤒 Pet health
r13.text:
Completing chapters has a 25% chance of a health event:
🤒 Virus: +200 XP | 🤕 Fall: +150 XP | 🫠 Fever: +100 XP
Events raise XP quickly! Use consumables to heal:
🍖 Food: -100 XP | 💧 Water: -50 XP | 💉 Vaccine: -200 XP
Consumables unlock after collecting all accessories.

r14.title: 💊 Gift consumables
r14.text: You can gift consumables to other players' pets! Visit their profile → if you have consumables, a button appears to heal their pet.

r15.title: 🏆 Public showcase
r15.text: On each player's profile you can see their collection of won furniture (showcase). Items not yet won appear in grey.

r16.title: 💀 Cursed cells
r16.text: Some positions hide a curse. If you observe there, you pay an extra fee (−0.3 or −0.5🪙). The curse stays hidden until someone steps on it. Breaking furniture reveals the rival's scenario category as compensation.

r17.title: 🪣 Bucket & ✨ Polish
r17.text:
🪣 Bucket — Match pool of 2 units. 5% drop on clean/repair.
💧 Combo: Use bucket on a fillable item (Kitchen sink, Bathroom sink, Bathtub, Shower, Washer) spending 0.3🪙 + 1 normal cloth → get a ✨ wet cloth.
✨ Polish — Free. Use the wet cloth on any clean piece of furniture for a guaranteed +2🪙.

r18.title: 💰 Social item costs
r18.text:
Offensive social items now cost tokens:
🍌 Banana · 🚧 Barricade · 🪤 Trap · 🕵️ Spy · 🔧 Steal screwdriver — 0.5🪙
🔄 Swap — 1.0🪙
🛡️ Shield · 💣 Smoke bomb · 💡 Hint — free.
🕵️ Spy now reveals the rival's last 3 visited scenarios.

helpPvp.mapBody: Each room is connected to others by doors. You can move between adjacent rooms.
helpPvp.rewardsBody: Win games to obtain decorative furniture. Each victory gives a random piece with probability:
helpPvp.rewardsTotal: Total: {count} pieces · Place them in scenarios or sell them for bonus tokens

intro.title: Welcome to Deduction Duel!
intro.body: A hide-and-seek game against a rival. You hide an object, they hide another, and you both search at the same time. First to find wins.

scenario.title: Pick a scenario
scenario.body: Each scenario has unique spots to hide objects in.
scenario.bodyPick: Tap a scenario to pick it. Each has its own board.

hide.title: Hide your object
hide.body: Pick an object and a spot. Your rival can't see where it is.
hide.tip: 💡 Your rival will have to deduce where it is by spending tokens.

search.title: Find the rival's object
search.body: Tap a spot to investigate it. Every attempt counts!

win.title: You won!
win.body: You found the object in {n} attempt(s). In the real game, every action spends tokens and speed decides the win.
win.bodyDynamic: You found {obj} in the {place} in {n} attempt(s). In the real game, every action spends tokens and speed decides the win.
win.realFeatures: In the real game you'll get:
win.feat4: Story mode with pet and evolution
